summary: Created careerspan-resume-intake skill that processes [RESUME] tagged emails. The skill extracts candidate info via LLM, matches to Job Openings, creates Airtable records, generates candidate guides via subprocess to careerspan-candidate-guide skill, uploads to Drive, and emails Shivam. Dry-run tested successfully.
notes: Script outputs instructions for Zo app tools (Airtable, Drive, Gmail) rather than calling them directly
Uses subprocess to call careerspan-candidate-guide skill like pipeline_orchestrator.py does
LLM-over-regex approach for all semantic understanding (candidate extraction, job matching)
Deposit format: structured JSON with candidate_id, candidate_name, job_match_confidence, candidate_guide_link, email_sent, flags
